nasb.text: The Lord has made everything for its own purpose, Even the wicked for the day of evil.

esv.text: The Lord has made everything for its purpose, even the wicked for the day of trouble.

cnv.text: 耶和華所造的各有目的， 連惡人也是為禍患的日子而造的。

ccb.text: 耶和华所造的万物各有其用， 连恶人也是为灾难之日所造。

csbs.text: 耶和华造一切都有其目的； 连恶人也为祸患的日子所造。
